title: "APP_VERSION"

# `APP_VERSION`

**Read by:** `athena`, `hera`, `site`

**Sensitive:** No — safe to log / share.

**Required:** no

## Purpose

App version string. Injected at build time from `package.json`.

## Where it's read

- **athena** — `grep -r "APP_VERSION" ../athena/src` for code locations
- **hera** — `grep -r "APP_VERSION" ../hera/src` for code locations
- **site** — `grep -r "APP_VERSION" ../site/src` for code locations

## Setting it

### Dev

Set in your local `.env.dev` file (managed by `octl deploy`).

### Prod

```bash
gh secret set APP_VERSION --body "<value>" -R OlympusOSS/platform
gh workflow run deploy.yml
```
